bars.name: Philosopher's Club
bars.notes: Solid locals ambience, always has games on

bars.name: The Athletic Club Oakland
bars.notes: **Best catch-all sports bar in East Bay**; official bar partner for Oakland Roots & Soul soccer and Oakland Ballers baseball; shows every game live, hosts all away game watch parties; all local draft beers; Oakland sports legend-themed cocktails (Vida Blue, Don Nelson); big booths; loaded food menu (crisscut fries, tempura cauliflower); St. Mary's Gaels crowd; brunch with chicken and waffles

bars.name: Mad Oak Bar 'N' Yard
bars.notes: 40 draft lines (primarily local beers/cider), quality cocktails, outdoor picnic tables, ballpark nachos, street tacos, mushroom fritters; games on many TVs (sound usually off); sprawling rooftop deck; DJs take over at night; Tuesday-Friday happy hour

bars.name: The Kingfish Pub & Cafe
bars.notes: Temescal; **over 100 years old** (first opened as bait shop serving beer); physically moved across the street in 2014; Cal sports museum atmosphere; outdoor patio turns into Bears football big-screen watch party on Saturdays; epic hot dogs and burgers

bars.name: George & Walt's
bars.notes: Rockridge; woman-owned oasis, open 75+ years; unmistakable neon outline sign; great food (chicken Parm sando, oxtail grilled cheese with tots); lively NFL Sundays, Warriors games with OG fans

bars.name: Yeti Sports Bar
bars.notes: **ONLY Bay Area spot with classic sports bar vibe + top-notch Himalayan food**; chicken momo dumplings, Nepalese pineapple fried rice, burgers, butterfly shrimp, wings, garlic Yeti fries; room wrapped in TVs

bars.name: Cali's Sports Bar
bars.notes: Opened May 2024; diversely minded space for UFC and all major sports; NY-, Detroit-, and Sicilian-style pizzas; 2 big projection screens + dozen TVs; two full bars; transforms into hip-hop venue in evening with VIP bottle service

bars.name: McGee's
bars.notes: Alameda; **best sports bar in Alameda**; open since 1977; welcoming no-frills watering hole; over a dozen TVs; outdoor dining patio; live music on weekends; rotating food: Paisano's Italian wings/pizza/sandos and Areito Latino's Puerto Rican tostones/tacos/Salzon smash burger

bars.name: Stadium Pub
bars.notes: Walnut Creek; **oldest sports bar in Walnut Creek**; cheap straightforward drinks and drafts; bar food favorites and signature Chicago-style dogs; Sundays: breakfast + football with $9 Hail Mary Bloody

bars.name: Primo's Pizzeria & Pub
bars.notes: Danville; **best family-friendly sports bar**; signature pizzas (GF, dairy-free, cauliflower crust); many salads; 39 TVs indoors and on handsome outdoor patio; 35 beers on draft (5 new ones added weekly)

NFL.name: The Athletic Club Oakland
NFL.notes: **Best catch-all sports bar in East Bay**; official bar partner for Oakland Roots & Soul soccer and Oakland Ballers baseball; shows every game live, hosts all away game watch parties; all local draft beers; Oakland sports legend-themed cocktails (Vida Blue, Don Nelson); big booths; loaded food menu (crisscut fries, tempura cauliflower); St. Mary's Gaels crowd; brunch with chicken and waffles

NFL.name: Mad Oak Bar 'N' Yard
NFL.notes: 40 draft lines (primarily local beers/cider), quality cocktails, outdoor picnic tables, ballpark nachos, street tacos, mushroom fritters; games on many TVs (sound usually off); sprawling rooftop deck; DJs take over at night; Tuesday-Friday happy hour

NFL.name: The Kingfish Pub & Cafe
NFL.notes: Temescal; **over 100 years old** (first opened as bait shop serving beer); physically moved across the street in 2014; Cal sports museum atmosphere; outdoor patio turns into Bears football big-screen watch party on Saturdays; epic hot dogs and burgers

NFL.name: George & Walt's
NFL.notes: Rockridge; woman-owned oasis, open 75+ years; unmistakable neon outline sign; great food (chicken Parm sando, oxtail grilled cheese with tots); lively NFL Sundays, Warriors games with OG fans

NFL.name: Yeti Sports Bar
NFL.notes: **ONLY Bay Area spot with classic sports bar vibe + top-notch Himalayan food**; chicken momo dumplings, Nepalese pineapple fried rice, burgers, butterfly shrimp, wings, garlic Yeti fries; room wrapped in TVs

NFL.name: Cali's Sports Bar
NFL.notes: Opened May 2024; diversely minded space for UFC and all major sports; NY-, Detroit-, and Sicilian-style pizzas; 2 big projection screens + dozen TVs; two full bars; transforms into hip-hop venue in evening with VIP bottle service

NFL.name: McGee's
NFL.notes: Alameda; **best sports bar in Alameda**; open since 1977; welcoming no-frills watering hole; over a dozen TVs; outdoor dining patio; live music on weekends; rotating food: Paisano's Italian wings/pizza/sandos and Areito Latino's Puerto Rican tostones/tacos/Salzon smash burger

NFL.name: Stadium Pub
NFL.notes: Walnut Creek; **oldest sports bar in Walnut Creek**; cheap straightforward drinks and drafts; bar food favorites and signature Chicago-style dogs; Sundays: breakfast + football with $9 Hail Mary Bloody

NFL.name: Primo's Pizzeria & Pub
NFL.notes: Danville; **best family-friendly sports bar**; signature pizzas (GF, dairy-free, cauliflower crust); many salads; 39 TVs indoors and on handsome outdoor patio; 35 beers on draft (5 new ones added weekly)
